description: Pilot control mapping library for SMERC/SPARTa routes executed through GitHub Actions and the GitHub deployment adapter.

tools.notes: GitHub Actions can enforce practical pilot controls when workflows declare environments, scoped permissions, dry-run steps, rollback jobs, and artifact retention.
The SMERC GitHub deployment adapter can consume permits, execute bounded deployment steps, and return non-secret execution reports.

controls.description: Persist the decision replay reference and policy evidence used to produce the posture.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Upload SMERC replay JSON as a retained workflow artifact.
native_mechanism.github_deployment_adapter: Bind replay_id and decision digest into the adapter execution report.

controls.description: Ensure the governed decision can be reconstructed after routing, review, or execution.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Store route report, action request, and workflow run URL as artifacts.
native_mechanism.github_deployment_adapter: Return route digest and execution report references to the caller.

controls.description: Reduce execution blast radius before permitting a constrained action.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Run canary, single-environment, or scoped path workflow with least-privilege permissions.
native_mechanism.github_deployment_adapter: Execute only the permit-bound capability, scope units, and target environment.

controls.description: Produce a dry-run or plan preview before side effects are allowed.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Run a dry-run, plan, diff, or validation job before the deployment job.

controls.description: Capture enough state to support rollback or forensic review before execution.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Record current deployment SHA, environment status, and configuration digest before changes.
native_mechanism.github_deployment_adapter: Store pre-execution state reference in the execution report.

controls.description: Require an executable rollback path before constrained execution proceeds.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Require rollback workflow, rollback command, or previous deployment redeploy target.
native_mechanism.github_deployment_adapter: Require a permit-bound rollback command or rollback workflow reference.

controls.description: Pause automation while preserving evidence and preventing further side effects.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Stop before deployment jobs and mark the run as requiring review.
native_mechanism.github_deployment_adapter: Return paused status without invoking the executor.

controls.description: Capture state at the time automation is frozen.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Collect current SHA, environment, deployment status, and pending job list as artifacts.

controls.description: Prevent execution of the requested action.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Fail the protected deployment job before credentials or deployment steps are reached.
native_mechanism.github_deployment_adapter: Reject permit consumption and do not call the executor.

controls.description: Return structured reason codes and reviewer-facing explanation when execution is denied.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Write reason codes to the workflow summary and retained artifact.
native_mechanism.github_deployment_adapter: Return denial reason codes in the adapter response.

controls.description: Route a decision to a named review path rather than allowing automatic execution.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Use protected environments, CODEOWNERS, or a reviewer issue with named accountable reviewers.

controls.description: Require accountable approval before a previously escalated action can proceed.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Require environment approval or explicit reviewer comment before deployment continuation.

controls.description: Record what actually happened after a permitted or constrained action executes.

native_mechanism.github_actions: Upload execution report artifact with status, duration, target, and rollback status.
native_mechanism.github_deployment_adapter: Return structured non-secret execution report to the SMERC caller.
